purpose: Extend tool/signals_sync.hexa with per-ID merge proposal mode (--by-id), then run it against the 40 drift items surfaced by yesterday's --proposed-merge and emit per-ID classification + action recommendation. No SSOT mutation this cycle — all 33 distinct per-ID actions target n6-arch (external SSOT), not nexus.

tier_1_implemented.rationale: added --by-id flag + 7 new hexa helpers (_entry_header, _entry_witness, _entry_body_sha, _entry_body_sha_no_witness, _classify_id, _is_last_id, _propose_action, _emit_by_id) to classify each drift id into EQUAL | CROSS_PUBLISH | APPLY_TRIVIAL | PROPOSE_ONLY | OBSTRUCTION | TAIL_ARTIFACT and emit per-ID actionable proposals. Self-test still PASS.

deduplicated the 40 raw drift items (counted pairwise across nexus/n6-arch + nexus/anima-n6 where anima-n6 is symlink to n6-arch) into 33 distinct per-id actions: 20 CROSS_PUBLISH (only-in-nexus tail block from 2026-04-21 absorption), 12 APPLY_TRIVIAL (CROSS-tag + witness++ pattern), 1 TAIL_ARTIFACT (SIG-RCLOOP-001 awk EOF pseudo-drift).

all 33 actions target n6-arch SSOT (external repo). nexus's atlas.signals.n6 is strictly forward — nothing to merge into nexus. Refused to mutate atlas.signals.n6 this cycle per kick brief default (propose-only, await user approval). Honesty preserved: TAIL_ARTIFACT explicitly distinguished from real BODY_DRIFT.

facts: F1 tool/signals_sync.hexa --by-id classifies common-id drift into HEADER_DRIFT | WITNESS_DRIFT | HEADER_WITNESS_DRIFT | BODY_DRIFT | BOTH_DRIFT and maps each to APPLY_TRIVIAL | PROPOSE_ONLY | OBSTRUCTION | TAIL_ARTIFACT.
F2 12 of 13 content-drift IDs in nexus vs n6-arch are HEADER_WITNESS_DRIFT (CROSS tag added + witness count incremented by 1) — semantically additive, no verdict downgrade.
F3 13th content-drift ID (SIG-RCLOOP-001) is TAIL_ARTIFACT: last @S in n6-arch so awk extraction runs to EOF and includes the trailing schema-v2 block. Body line content is identical.

F4 20 only-in-nexus signals (SIG-BIG-901..917 + SIG-CRIT-201, SIG-KURA-201, SIG-META-211, SIG-META-BIG-SUMMARY, SIG-STAR-201, SIG-UNIV-211) are part of the 2026-04-21 'Agent B 흡수 (n6-arch 전체) 병합' tail block — backport candidates for n6-arch.
F5 raw drift=40 = (20 only_in_nexus + 0) × 2 pairs because anima-n6 is a symlink to n6-arch. Distinct per-id action count is 33.
F6 No edits applied to /Users/ghost/core/nexus/n6/atlas.signals.n6 this cycle. atlas.n6 (L0) untouched. atlas.signals.n6 + atlas.millennium.n6 SSOT separation preserved.
F7 HEXA-ONLY constraint upheld: all extensions in .hexa, no .py/.sh/.rs/.toml created.
